text: Which of the following should be done for a crew member experiencing a heat-related illness?

options.text: A) Apply cool, wet cloths to the body
B) Give the victim plenty of fluids to drink
C) Move the victim to a cool, shaded area

explanation: Managing heat-related illnesses involves a multi-faceted approach including cooling the body with wet cloths, encouraging fluid intake if conscious and able to swallow, and moving the person to a cooler environment. These actions collectively help reduce body temperature and prevent further heat injury.
